_note: Add-item request body shape exactly as the component's form. The design collects 'Precio unitario' in normal currency terms and maps it to unitPriceInCents (integer cents) before sending — see integration-plan.md. quantity is an integer; taxRateId is optional (null = Sin impuesto). The backend computes position, lineTotalInCents, lineTaxInCents and the refreshed invoice totals; nothing is committed until the item is created and the invoice re-fetched.
_afterCreate: Re-fetch GET .../invoices/{invoiceId} to get authoritative totals; do not keep the client preview as the source of truth.
error_422_example: El precio unitario debe ser mayor a cero.
error_409_example: La factura ya no está en estado borrador; no se pueden agregar líneas.
